subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured of the Divine Word! His honour, the Brother, traversed a thousand leagues through the wilderness, [facing] wild beasts and the claws of the leviathan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بکلمه الهی جناب اخوی هزار فرسنگ طی نمود و از درندگان صحرا و چنگ نهنگ
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
